info.name: Ewentcast API
info.description:
Complete Ewentcast backend collection (all routes).

Auth: Collection uses Bearer {{authToken}}. Login/Register auto-save the token.
Flow: Auth → Login → Connect Channels (Settings) → Events sync-from-api → Registry / Bookings.

Note: There is no /dashboard route. Channel connect = PUT /settings. Events have no separate create/edit REST — use Sync (upsert) or Sync from API.

request.description: API root message.
Liveness probe.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Register / login / me / password / verify. Login + Register save {{authToken}}.

request.description: Creates user + trial + session. Saves authToken.
Login and auto-save Bearer {{authToken}}.
Current user + subscription (requires Login first).
Invalidate current session token.
Returns array with the authenticated user only.
Own profile (+ subscription, settings). 403 if id ≠ self.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Overview KPIs — ported from eventlifter-core GET /api/dashboard/stats.

request.description: Per-channel events/bookings/tickets/revenue, totals, unifiedAttendees, recent events (60), recent bookings (8), 7-day bookingTrend. Requires Bearer token. Also use Connect Channels (Settings) + Registry for full Overview UI.

item.name: Connect Channels (Settings)
item.description: Connect / update / disconnect channel credentials. This is the connect-channel surface (PUT /settings).

request.description: Channel credentials with secrets masked + configured flags.
Unmasked stored JSON. Use carefully.
Save Luma API key + calendarId (partial merge).
Save Eventbrite OAuth app + private token. OAuth callback route is not implemented yet; privateToken is used for API sync.
Save Hightribe service URL + API key + webhook secret.
Reset Luma settings to defaults.
Reset Eventbrite settings to defaults.
Reset Hightribe settings to defaults.

item.name: Events
item.description: Per-channel events. Create/edit = Sync upsert or Sync-from-API. Get/list/delete included. channel = luma | eventbrite | hightribe.

request.description: All channel bookings for the authenticated user.
Generic list using {{channel}} variable.
Generic get using {{channel}} + {{externalId}}.

item.name: Luma
item.description: luma events: list / get / sync (create|update upsert) / sync-from-api / delete

request.description: List stored events for this channel (current user).
Get one stored event by externalId.
Upsert events into DB (acts as create + edit). Set prune=true to remove missing ones.
Pull events (and bookings where supported) from the live channel API using Connect Channel credentials.
Upsert bookings for this channel.
Delete one stored event by externalId.
Delete all events + bookings + registry links for this channel.

item.name: Eventbrite
item.description: eventbrite events: list / get / sync (create|update upsert) / sync-from-api / delete

request.description: List stored events for this channel (current user).
Get one stored event by externalId.
Upsert events into DB (acts as create + edit). Set prune=true to remove missing ones.
Pull events (and bookings where supported) from the live channel API using Connect Channel credentials.
Upsert bookings for this channel.
Delete one stored event by externalId.
Delete all events + bookings + registry links for this channel.

request.description: List stored events for this channel (current user).
Get one stored event by externalId.
Upsert events into DB (acts as create + edit). Set prune=true to remove missing ones.
Pull events (and bookings where supported) from the live channel API using Connect Channel credentials.
Upsert bookings for this channel.

item.name: Registry
item.description: Master events linking channel events. List/get include per-channel status + publishState.

request.description: List master events for token user. Each channelRef has status + publishState (published|draft).
Create master event with optional channelRefs.
Single master event with channelRefs (+ publishState) and attendees.
Attendees for a master event.
Webhook endpoint URLs + Hightribe env hints.
Register webhooks on Luma + Eventbrite using saved credentials.
Requires x-webhook-log-token or ?token= WEBHOOK_LOG_TOKEN.
If webhookSecret configured, send X-Webhook-Secret header.
Documents expected Hightribe webhook payload.
